hero.title: Facilities Management
hero.subtitle: A single point of contact for the daily running of your workplace.
hero.description: We provide the facilities management support you need to keep your premises running smoothly — so you can focus on your business. A complete, boutique service tailored to the image you want to project and the way your people work.

overview.heading: Boutique Service, Complete Coverage
overview.description: Every workplace is different. As a boutique-sized partner we are more flexible and more responsive than larger providers, while still giving your building and your people the individual, hands-on attention they deserve.

features.title: Hard FM & Maintenance
features.description: Planned and reactive maintenance across mechanical, electrical and building fabric. Statutory inspections, servicing and compliance evidence kept in one place.

features.title: Soft FM Services
features.description: Cleaning, security, waste, landscaping and front-of-house arranged through a single supplier relationship — with SLAs and performance reporting you can actually read.

features.title: Statutory Compliance
features.description: Fire safety, water hygiene, asbestos, PAT, lifts and pressure systems — a structured compliance calendar with records ready for insurers, auditors or landlords.

features.title: Supplier & Contract Management
features.description: We select, brief and manage your supply chain — writing specifications, running tenders, holding contractors to their SLAs and challenging cost.

features.title: Space & Move Planning
features.description: Churn, reconfigurations, desk planning and small works coordinated without disrupting your operation. Practical project work to keep the workplace working.

features.title: Problem Anticipation
features.description: We look ahead on your behalf — spotting compliance cliffs, lease obligations and end-of-life equipment before they become urgent, expensive problems.

steps.title: Audit & Baseline
steps.description: We walk the building, review your current contracts, compliance records and supplier performance, and baseline exactly what 'good' looks like for your site.

steps.title: Tailored Service Plan
steps.description: We build a service model around your actual needs — hours of operation, risk profile, budget and culture — rather than forcing you into a generic FM package.

steps.title: Day-to-Day Delivery
steps.description: One point of contact for everything building-related. Compliance handled quietly, suppliers managed properly, issues triaged before they reach you.

cta.heading: Let's Talk
cta.description: Whether you need a full outsourced FM partner or targeted support in specific areas, we'll tailor our service to the way your workplace actually runs.
